creator: dns2blackhole1@a1poweruser.com
text: From the author. This has no effect on the port. First off very few people run the update2 script because it uses a large amount of memory. Comment #3 describes the real problem and I agree with it. In time the owners will update their site data and I think this is a temporary situation and the http://rlwpx.free.fr/WPFF/ site should fix itself when they do their normal update.
